headline: The $13 Billion World Cup: Inside FIFA’s Massive Moneymaking Play
summary: The 2026 World Cup, to be played in North America, has been called the equivalent of 104 Super Bowls in a month. Who stands to gain—and what it will cost fans.

headline: Is Home Depot (HD) Undervalued After Recent Share Price Weakness And Slower Remodeling Demand
summary: How Home Depot stock has been trading Home Depot (HD) has recently drawn attention as the stock trades around $310.78, with returns down about 2% over the past month and about 12% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Home Depot. Looking beyond the recent pullback, Home Depot’s 1 year total shareholder return is down about 13%, while its 3 year and 5 year total shareholder returns are both positive. This suggests that shorter term momentum has faded compared with longer term...
